name: Permanent damage from machine—how much disability pay?
description: Scheduled weeks of pay based on impairment[4].

mainEntity.name: Permanent damage from machine—how much disability pay?

acceptedAnswer.text: Scheduled weeks of pay based on impairment[4].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Scheduled benefits by body part, e.g., arm loss up to 250 weeks pay.** Plus impairment rating[4]. **Key factors:** Doctor rating. **Practical guidance:** Wait for max med improvement; negotiate. Varies by state wage.
